<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request! Please make sure you have read the
contributing guide before submitting: CONTRIBUTING.md
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? 1–3 sentences max. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply -->

- [ ] 🐞 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds capability)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing public API)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation only
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / CI / dependencies

## Related issues

<!-- Link issues this PR addresses. Use "Closes #123" to auto-close. -->

Closes #

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran. New unit tests? Manual reproduction
     of the bug? Integration tests against a real Clever Cloud account? -->

- [ ] Added / updated unit tests
- [ ] Added / updated integration tests
- [ ] Manually verified against a real Clever Cloud account
- [ ] Not applicable (docs / chore)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project coding style (`composer cs` is green)
- [ ] PHPStan passes (`composer phpstan` is green)
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`composer test` is green)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation under `docs/` for any public API change
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` if relevant
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to, edge cases you
     are unsure about, or design decisions worth discussing. -->
